email_1.subject: Conrad — EAs running CMA Tax Services spend 6+ hours/week on this
email_1.body:
Conrad,

Every IRS transcript that lands on your desk takes about 20 minutes to work through — manually cross-referencing transaction codes, identifying urgent notices, translating IRS language into something your clients can act on.

For an EA handling 20 transcripts a week, that's 6.7 hours. Every week. 348 hours a year.

I built a tool that does it in seconds. Upload a transcript PDF, get a professional plain-English report with every code explained and recommendations included. No subscription — 10 analyses for $19.

Here's a free IRS code lookup to try first, no account needed:
https://transcript.taxmonitor.pro/tools/code-lookup

And here's a quick practice analysis I put together for CMA Tax Services:
https://transcript.taxmonitor.pro/asset/conrad-aarseth-wilton-ca

If any of this lands, I'd be glad to show you a live analysis on a real transcript — 15 minutes on Google Meet.
https://cal.com/tax-monitor-pro/ttmp-discovery

—
Jamie L Williams
Transcript Tax Monitor Pro
transcript.taxmonitor.pro
